test_cases.name: health_check_success
test_cases.description: Verify health check endpoint returns 200 OK

test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Create author without required name field returns validation error

test_cases.name: create_author_name_too_long
test_cases.description: Create author with name exceeding 100 characters returns validation error

test_cases.name: get_author_detail_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve author detail and verify ETag header is present

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: GET author with If-None-Match matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: GET non-existent author returns 404 Not Found

test_cases.name: update_author_success
test_cases.description: Update author with valid data

test_cases.name: update_author_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: PUT author with If-Match header containing wrong ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed

test_cases.name: delete_author_success
test_cases.description: Delete author without associated books returns 204

test_cases.name: create_category_success
test_cases.description: Create category with name and optional description

test_cases.name: create_category_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Create category with duplicate name returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: get_category_detail_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve category detail with ETag header

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Create book with all required fields (title, isbn, price, published_year, author_id, category_id)

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Create book with duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Create book with ISBN outside 10-13 character range returns 422

test_cases.name: create_book_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Create book with non-existent author_id returns 404

test_cases.name: list_books_with_pagination
test_cases.description: List books with default pagination (page=1, page_size=10)

test_cases.description: List books with search parameter filtering by title or ISBN

test_cases.name: list_books_with_price_range
test_cases.description: List books filtered by min_price and max_price

test_cases.name: get_book_detail_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve book detail with author and category nested objects

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: GET soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Soft delete book sets is_deleted flag without physical removal

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore soft-deleted book returns it to active state

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: update_stock_increase
test_cases.description: Increase book stock with positive quantity parameter

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient
test_cases.description: Decrease stock below zero returns 400 Insufficient stock

test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published within 1 year returns 400

test_cases.name: apply_discount_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Exceed 5 requests per 10 seconds rate limit returns 429
